sys_app_requirement.acceptance_criteria: A calendar UI is accessible from the portal showing Mon, Wed, Fri slots. Non-working days are not selectable. The layout is clear and responsive.
sys_app_requirement.description: Build a dedicated calendar widget (Service Portal or UI Builder) that displays a weekly view focused on Monday, Wednesday, and Friday. The widget must show available 1-hour slots and be accessible to users with the student role.
sys_app_requirement.name: REQ-001: Custom Calendar Widget
